parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Extract Call Data').first().json;
const transcript = data.transcript || '';

const prompt = `Analysiere dieses Gespraechstranskript eines Sales-Calls und bewerte den Lead.
Antworte als JSON mit diesen Feldern:
- score_company_size (1-3): 1=klein/<10 Mitarbeiter, 2=mittel/10-49 Mitarbeiter, 3=gross/50+ Mitarbeiter
- score_tech_stack (1-3): 1=keine Automation, 2=erste Erfahrung mit Automation, 3=nutzt Zapier/Make/APIs
- score_pain_point (1-3): 1=nur Info, 2=allgemeines Interesse, 3=konkreter dringender Use Case
- score_timeline (1-3): 1=kein Zeitrahmen, 2=1-3 Monate, 3=innerhalb 1 Monat
- conversation_summary (string, max 200 Woerter, auf Deutsch)
- sentiment (einer von: positiv, neutral, negativ)
- objections_raised (array of strings, z.B. ["Kein Budget", "Keine Zeit"])
- drop_off_point (string oder null): Die Phase, in der der Anrufer abgesprungen ist OHNE Termin zu buchen. Setze null wenn ein Termin erfolgreich gebucht wurde. Moegliche Werte nur bei Abbruch: "DISCOVERY", "QUALIFICATION", "DEMO_OFFER", "CLOSING"
- is_decision_maker (boolean)
- status (einer von: new, contacted, qualified, appointment_booked, converted, lost)
- next_steps (array of strings)
- caller_name (string oder null): Der vollstaendige Name des MENSCHLICHEN Gespraechspartners (NICHT der KI-Assistentin Lisa!). Suche nach typischen Begruessungen wie "Hier ist [Name]", "[Nachname], hallo", "Mein Name ist [Name]", "[Name] am Apparat". Setze null falls kein Name erkennbar.
- company (string oder null): Der Firmenname des menschlichen Gespraechspartners, falls im Transcript erwaehnt
- company_size (string oder null): Beschreibung der Unternehmensgroesse, z.B. "80 Mitarbeiter", "kleines Team von 5 Leuten"
- current_stack (string oder null): Aktuell verwendete Tools/Systeme, z.B. "Zapier", "alles manuell"
- pain_point (string oder null): Das Hauptproblem oder der konkrete Use Case des Gespraechspartners
- timeline (string oder null): Zeitrahmen fuer die Umsetzung, z.B. "naechsten Monat", "Q2"

WICHTIG: Die KI-Assistentin heisst Lisa und arbeitet bei n8n. Extrahiere NICHT ihren Namen als caller_name. Der caller_name ist immer die andere Person im Gespraech.

Transcript: ${transcript}`;

const requestBody = JSON.stringify({
  model: 'openai/gpt-4o-mini',
  response_format: { type: 'json_object' },
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }]
});

return [{ json: { requestBody, callId: data.callId, transcript: data.transcript, callDurationSeconds: data.callDurationSeconds, callStartedAt: data.callStartedAt, phone: data.phone } }];

const data = $input.first().json;

return [{ json: {
  callId: data.callId,
  phone: data.phone,
  callDurationSeconds: data.callDurationSeconds,
  callStartedAt: data.callStartedAt,
  score_company_size: 1,
  score_tech_stack: 1,
  score_pain_point: 1,
  score_timeline: 1,
  conversation_summary: 'Kein Transkript verfuegbar.',
  sentiment: 'neutral',
  objections_raised: [],
  drop_off_point: null,
  is_decision_maker: false,
  status: 'contacted',
  next_steps: [],
  transcript: '',
  caller_name: null,
  company: null,
  company_size: null,
  current_stack: null,
  pain_point: null,
  timeline: null
} }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO leads (
  call_id, score_company_size, score_tech_stack, score_pain_point, score_timeline,
  transcript, conversation_summary, sentiment,
  objections_raised, drop_off_point,
  call_duration_seconds, call_started_at,
  is_decision_maker, status, next_steps, phone,
  caller_name, company, company_size, current_stack, pain_point, timeline
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4, $5,
  $6, $7, $8,
  $9::text[], $10,
  $11, $12::timestamptz,
  $13, $14, $15::text[], $16,
  $17, $18, $19, $20, $21, $22
)
ON CONFLICT (call_id) DO UPDATE SET
  score_company_size = EXCLUDED.score_company_size,
  score_tech_stack = EXCLUDED.score_tech_stack,
  score_pain_point = EXCLUDED.score_pain_point,
  score_timeline = EXCLUDED.score_timeline,
  transcript = EXCLUDED.transcript,
  conversation_summary = EXCLUDED.conversation_summary,
  sentiment = EXCLUDED.sentiment,
  objections_raised = EXCLUDED.objections_raised,
  drop_off_point = CASE
    WHEN leads.appointment_booked = true THEN null
    ELSE EXCLUDED.drop_off_point
  END,
  call_duration_seconds = EXCLUDED.call_duration_seconds,
  call_started_at = EXCLUDED.call_started_at,
  is_decision_maker = EXCLUDED.is_decision_maker,
  status = CASE
    WHEN leads.appointment_booked = true AND leads.status = 'appointment_booked'
    THEN leads.status
    ELSE EXCLUDED.status
  END,
  next_steps = EXCLUDED.next_steps,
  phone = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.phone, leads.phone),
  caller_name = COALESCE(leads.caller_name, EXCLUDED.caller_name),
  company = COALESCE(leads.company, EXCLUDED.company),
  company_size = COALESCE(leads.company_size, EXCLUDED.company_size),
  current_stack = COALESCE(leads.current_stack, EXCLUDED.current_stack),
  pain_point = COALESCE(leads.pain_point, EXCLUDED.pain_point),
  timeline = COALESCE(leads.timeline, EXCLUDED.timeline)
UPDATE objection_categories SET occurrence_count = occurrence_count + 1 WHERE name = ANY($1::text[])
